scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run server.ts" "bun run --cwd client dev"
scripts.db:dump: bun -e "import { initDb } from './db.ts'; initDb();" && sqlite3 tenderiq.db .dump > db_snapshot.sql && echo 'DB dumped to db_snapshot.sql'
scripts.db:restore: sqlite3 tenderiq.db < db_snapshot.sql && echo 'DB restored from db_snapshot.sql'
